steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$3x + y = 13$$ and $$4x - y = 15$$. This gives $\frac{4}{3}\neq\frac{-1}{1}$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The coefficient ratios differ, so the lines intersect once — exactly one solution. That matches choice A — A is correct.
